personalInfo.personalStatement: Full-stack software engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and cloud-based solutions.

workExperience.description:

Built real-time data processing pipeline handling 500K events per second
Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%
Developed RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints for mobile applications
Collaborated with product team to define technical requirements and roadmap

Created responsive web applications using React and Node.js
Integrated third-party payment systems into e-commerce platform
Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving 85% code coverage
Participated in agile development process with daily standups and sprint planning
